provenance.note: Second independent live run, 2026-06-19, via `npm run proof:skill-orientation:live`. Checked in to anchor the 'reasoning differs run to run, orientation invariant holds' claim in artifacts, not narrative. Ephemeral /tmp artifact paths stripped.
